title: pycreus sanguinolentus f. rubromarginatus
intro: Pycreus sanguinolentus f. rubromarginatus, also known as the red-edged blood sedge, is a plant species in the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pycreus sanguinolentus f. rubromarginatus include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional African medicine.
